recurringPattern: Centered card with logo above, email + password fields, 'Sign In' button, 'Forgot password?' link, and a social login separator ('Or continue with') with Google/GitHub icon buttons. Background often a gradient or abstract geometric pattern.
designHarm: The social-auth separator and multi-button row create choice overload at the moment of entry. The floating card on decorative background wastes vertical space on mobile. Users spend extra cognitive cycles choosing a login method instead of getting into the app.
legitimateExceptions: Consumer apps where social login is the primary entry path (reducing friction)
Enterprise apps requiring SSO as the only or default option
possibleFixtures: Standard sign-in card with social login row
Minimalist sign-in with one default method, no decorative background
Sign-in that merges email+social into a single entry point
originalObservations: The authentication card template is remarkably consistent across AI generations: centered card, decorative background, social buttons stack.
The decorative background is either a purple-blue gradient, abstract mesh, or geometric pattern with no brand connection.
Passwords fields always use a show/hide eye icon inside the input.
